phonetic: 藞t蓱藧r蓹蕣; 藞t忙r蓹蕣
examples: I look down at my toes in the cool, black mud of the taro patch.
Asian populations in Seattle enjoy green bean, red bean and taro ice creams.
According to Deng, Japan imports taro from Chenzhou because of its high quality.
Many people blame the Prime Minister Taro Aso for allowing the recession to get worse.
Prime Minister Taro Aso has promised public spending to soften the impact of the recession.
